title: 151 FRAGILE PRINTED ADHESIVE TAPE
features: EASY TO MARK FRAGILE PACKAGES: 151 Adhesives White Tape, printed in red with the word FRAGILE for high visability. Easily mark packages and storage boxes.
STORAGE & MOVING HOME: Use 151 Fragile Printed Packing Tape for securely sealing boxes and cartons when moving home, for storing items short or long term.

ATTIC & GARAGE STORAGE: Use 151 Fragile Printed Packing Tape when placing items in the attic, loft, garage or workshop where items often remain stored for a long time, helping keep items easily identified as Fragile.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use roll of Fragile printed plastic tape. 48mm x 50M. Store at room temperature
